name: Steve McCall
abstract: Steve McCall (September 30, 1933 – May 24, 1989) was an American jazz drummer.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Ornette Coleman and Prime Time/ Cecil Taylor Unit

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: He played drums with me and another bass player named Scotty Holt, was McCall. Steve McCall. ... And then Air with Threadgill, Steve McCall and Fred Hopkins. Yeah, that was a great group.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
